skill/creative-franchise-expansion.name: Creative Franchise Expansion
skill/creative-franchise-expansion.learnedFromFinding: When expanding a creative franchise, it's crucial to maintain consistent continuity across all parts to avoid contradictions and ensure a cohesive narrative.

skill/automation-maintenance.name: Automation Maintenance
skill/automation-maintenance.learnedFromFinding: Automated hooks can become stale and require manual intervention to resolve, highlighting the need for engineers to regularly review and update automation scripts to prevent such issues.

skill/api-rate-limiting.name: API Rate Limiting
skill/api-rate-limiting.learnedFromFinding: When integrating third-party APIs, be prepared for unexpected rate limits that may not be directly related to your usage.

skill/angular-upgrade.name: Angular Upgrade
skill/angular-upgrade.learnedFromFinding: When upgrading Angular versions, ensure that local bridges and WebSocket servers are correctly configured to avoid connection issues.

skill/command-verification.name: Command Verification
skill/command-verification.learnedFromFinding: When working with local commands, always verify the actual current state by checking official documentation or authoritative sources instead of relying on inferred information.

skill/api-security.name: API Security
skill/api-security.learnedFromFinding: Always ensure valid authentication credentials are used when interacting with APIs to avoid repeated errors.

skill/memory-management.name: Memory Management
skill/memory-management.learnedFromFinding: When dealing with resource-constrained environments, ensure that critical processes like model loading have sufficient memory allocated to prevent silent failures due to out-of-memory errors.
useCases: Memory allocation for large model loads

skill/db-migration-safety.name: DB Migration Safety
skill/db-migration-safety.learnedFromFinding: Run schema migrations as expandâ†’backfillâ†’contract: never drop or rename a column in the same deploy that stops writing it, or in-flight code will read a column that no longer exists.

skill/docker-build-caching.name: Docker Build Caching
skill/docker-build-caching.learnedFromFinding: Order Dockerfile layers from least to most volatile and copy dependency manifests before source, so a code change doesn't bust the dependency-install cache layer.

skill/ci-flake-quarantine.name: CI Flake Quarantine
skill/ci-flake-quarantine.learnedFromFinding: When a test fails non-deterministically, quarantine it after N flaky runs instead of blanket-retrying the suite â€” blanket retries mask real regressions and inflate CI time.
useCases: Keeping signal in the test suite

skill/secret-rotation.name: Secret Rotation
skill/secret-rotation.learnedFromFinding: Rotate secrets with overlapping dual-validity windows â€” provision and activate the new secret before revoking the old one â€” so in-flight requests don't fail with 401 mid-rotation.

skill/websocket-reconnection.name: WebSocket Reconnection
skill/websocket-reconnection.learnedFromFinding: On a dropped WebSocket, reconnect with jittered exponential backoff and a resumable session token â€” never tight-loop reconnect, which stampedes the server on mass disconnects.

skill/rest-api-design.name: REST API Design
skill/rest-api-design.description: Design predictable, resource-oriented HTTP APIs with correct verbs, status codes, versioning, and consistent error envelopes.

skill/oauth2-jwt-auth.name: OAuth2 / JWT Auth
skill/oauth2-jwt-auth.description: Implement standards-compliant OAuth2 flows and JWT validation: short-lived access tokens, rotated refresh tokens, and verified signatures.

skill/idempotency-keys.name: Idempotency Keys
skill/idempotency-keys.description: Make unsafe POST/payment operations safe to retry by deduplicating on a client-supplied idempotency key.

skill/cursor-pagination.name: Cursor Pagination
skill/cursor-pagination.description: Paginate large, mutating datasets with stable opaque cursors instead of OFFSET, avoiding drift and deep-page slowdown.

skill/redis-caching.name: Redis Caching
skill/redis-caching.description: Add a Redis cache layer correctly: cache-aside reads, sane TTLs, explicit invalidation, and stampede protection.

skill/docker-containerization.name: Docker Containerization
skill/docker-containerization.description: Build small, secure, reproducible container images with multi-stage builds, pinned bases, and non-root runtime.

skill/kubernetes-orchestration.name: Kubernetes Orchestration
skill/kubernetes-orchestration.description: Run workloads on Kubernetes with correct resource requests/limits, probes, and rollout strategy for self-healing deploys.

skill/ci-cd-pipelines.name: CI/CD Pipelines
skill/ci-cd-pipelines.description: Automate build, test, and deploy with fast, reproducible pipelines, quality gates, and safe progressive rollout.

skill/structured-logging.name: Structured Logging
skill/structured-logging.description: Emit machine-parseable JSON logs with consistent fields, levels, and a correlation id — never bare strings.

skill/observability-tracing.name: Observability & Tracing
skill/observability-tracing.description: Instrument services with OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, and context propagation to debug distributed latency.

skill/database-indexing.name: Database Indexing
skill/database-indexing.description: Design indexes that match query predicates and sort order, covering hot paths while controlling write cost.

skill/input-validation.name: Input Validation
skill/input-validation.description: Validate and normalize all external input at the boundary with allowlist schemas, rejecting before it reaches logic.

skill/retry-with-backoff.name: Retry with Backoff
skill/retry-with-backoff.description: Retry transient failures with exponential backoff, jitter, caps, and circuit breaking — only for idempotent calls.

skill/async-concurrency.name: Async Concurrency
skill/async-concurrency.description: Run I/O concurrently with bounded parallelism, cancellation, and backpressure — without blocking the event loop.

skill/test-automation.name: Test Automation
skill/test-automation.description: Build a fast, reliable automated test suite shaped as a pyramid: many unit, fewer integration, few deterministic E2E.
